steps.title: Use the clam evidence
steps.content: The archaeological evidence shows significant increases in clam size and abundance where the documented terraced-garden method was used. Size points to robustness; abundance points to maintaining a food source.

steps.title: Stay within the evidence
steps.content: Choice A makes an unsupported comparison with Temiar and Tlingit songs. Choice B invents adoption by non-Indigenous people. Choice C makes an unsupported claim about contemporary practice. The remaining choice follows from increased size and abundance. The answer is D.
